title: ayapanopsis euphyes
intro_study: According to "Journal of ethnopharmacology", ayapanopsis euphyes benefits from its extracts, specifically the n-hexane fraction, include marked anti-inflammatory activity.
side_effects: Ayapanopsis euphyes can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant may also lead to more severe side effects, including liver damage and kidney problems. In some cases, improper use of Ayapanopsis euphyes may cause allergic reactions, such as hives, itching, and swelling. Furthermore, using the plant for medicinal purposes without proper guidance and knowledge can result in interactions with other medications and exacerbate underlying health conditions.
